headline: Walmart makes big Great Value change to win over shoppers
summary: Walmart has long defined itself by one core promise: low prices on everyday essentials. As the largest grocer in the U.S., Walmart dominates food retail by offering a wide range of products and ultra-competitive pricing that other big-box stores and supermarkets struggle to match. ...

headline: 'The results shocked me': A shopper compared 32 items at Walmart and Costco — and one store was nearly 26% cheaper
summary: It can be difficult and time-consuming to comparison shop, but it can also help you save a lot of money
